signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3][4]
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3][4]

Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell stated on March 18, 2026, that he will serve as chair pro-tem beyond his May term end if his successor—reportedly nominee Kevin Warsh—is not Senate-confirmed by then, per legal precedent[1][3]. He also affirmed staying until an ongoing criminal inves
